--- ### ALL PAGES ### layout: themes/[ site.theme.id ]/frontend/pages/index ### REGULAR PAGES ### meta: title: "{{ site.meta.title }}" description: "{{ site.meta.description }}" breadcrumb: "Home" ### SCHEMA ### schema: software_application: enabled: true features: - "Free to use" - "24/7 availability" - "User-friendly interface" --- {{ content | uj_content_format }}
